raw.objective: “to evaluate the feasibility and safety of the administration of 2,500 mg add-on ivLEV in adult patients with SE. The secondary objective was to assess an ivLEV pharmacokinetic (PK) population model of patients with SE to support safety data and future studies”
raw.covariates: Included: WT on CL and Vd
raw.observations: Not much information is provided regarding the model building and evaluation. Parameters CL and Vd in per kg, but not clear if this was decided on beforehand or found as significant covariate during model building. Error model not reported. No goodness-of-fit plots
raw.structure: 2 compartment with linear elimination and no absorption (IV)
raw.equations: CL=theta1* WT* (1+eta1) V1=theta2*WT* (1+eta2) K12=theta3*(1+eta3) K21=theta4*(1+eta4) Cobs=Cipred
raw.parameter_values: theta1=0.0476 theta2=0.45 theta3=0.24 theta4=0.70 omega1= 0.0954 omega2=0.035 omega3=0.25 omega4=0.099

extraction_target.title: Safety and pharmacokinetics of intravenous levetiracetam infusion as add-on in status epilepticus.

structural_model.description: 2 compartment with linear elimination and no absorption (IV)

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: “to evaluate the feasibility and safety of the administration of 2,500 mg add-on ivLEV in adult patients with SE. The secondary objective was to assess an ivLEV pharmacokinetic (PK) population model of patients with SE to support safety data and future studies”

covariates.raw: Included: WT on CL and Vd

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
